title: HORYO
description: A Vanilla-like pack using a simplistic style.
body:
![Welcome to HORYO!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7d56bd8cd8358a101046eaae85e0646da0015dd.png)
![https://i.imgur.com/dDH6cNV.png](https://i.imgur.com/dDH6cNV.png)

## **Horyo is a vanilla-friendly resource pack which aims to focus on quality, long term support and community feedbacks. While looking relatively different from the current Minecraft textues, it still focus on keeping the same ideas.**
